title: LeanCraft Optimized + PvP QoL
description: This project adds optimization, quality of life and small PvP improvements.
body:
LeanCraft is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with subtle yet impactful Quality of Life improvements, PvP optimizations, and client-side performance boosts. Whether you're exploring, building, or battling, this pack ensures smoother gameplay without compromising the vanilla feel.

⚡ Key Features:
Improved FPS & Load Times with cutting-edge optimization mods

Enhanced UI & HUD for better in-game awareness

Refined PvP Experience with better viewmodel and new HUD Elements.

Client-side only – fully compatible with vanilla servers

🧩 Included Mods:
Performance & Optimization: Sodium, Sodium Extra, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, EntityCulling, More Culling, Exordium, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine

Quality of Life & UI Enhancements: AppleSkin, Inventory HUD+, MiniHUD, WI Zoom, Mod Menu, Model Gap Fix, ChatAnimation, Chat Patches, MaLiLib

Networking & Compatibility: ViaFabricPlus, Forge Config API Port, Fabric API, YetAnotherConfigLib

Privacy & Clean Experience: No Chat Reports, No Telemetry, Remove Reloading Screen, Server Pack Unlocker, Server Pinger Fixer

🎨 Resource Packs:
Mini-Stuff – Compact visuals for better readability

Slightly-Improved-Font – Cleaner, more legible text

✨ Optional Shader Packs:
Anti-Aliasing Options: TAA, FXAA – for smoother edges and visual polish
